prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, bustling background. Mira Ledgerfall, an androgynous senior cadre in a navy cloak with gold trim, stands beside Ari Oakspire, a masculine quartermaster in a vest and sash. Mira holds a leather-bound ledger and points to a specific entry, looking at Ari with a confident expression. Ari leans in, holding a ledger tablet, watching Mira's finger. Consistent lighting, anime art style, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous shot in the Japanese fantasy guild hall. Ari Oakspire nods, smiling, and uses a stylus to update his ledger tablet to match the entry Mira Ledgerfall is pointing to. Mira closes the guild ledger with a satisfied nod, both characters working in perfect sync to reconcile inventory records. Consistent lighting, anime art style, no text, no watermark.
